entries.source: Separate documented fact from plausible reconstruction.
entries.value: Tenganisha ukweli uliorekodiwa na ujenzi upya unaowezekana.

entries.source: Separate fact from invention
entries.value: Tenganisha ukweli na ubunifu

entries.source: Separate in-character claims from evidence notes.
entries.value: Tenganisha madai ya ndani ya mhusika na maelezo ya ushahidi.

entries.source: Separate known facts, plausible reconstruction, contested interpretation, and speculation. Do not fabricate direct quotes or fake sources. Do not romanticize violence, empire, slavery, caste, disease, oppression, or persecution. Keep in-world knowledge separate from historian knowledge.
entries.value: Tenganisha ukweli unaojulikana, ujenzi upya unaowezekana, tafsiri inayobishaniwa, na uvumi. Usibuni nukuu za moja kwa moja au vyanzo bandia. Usipambe vurugu, himaya, utumwa, tabaka, magonjwa, ukandamizaji, au mateso. Weka maarifa ya ndani ya ulimwengu wa simulizi tofauti na maarifa ya mwanahistoria.

entries.value: Service na maudhui yake asilia (isipokuwa Content inayotolewa na watumiaji), vipengele na utendaji wake ni na vitaendelea kuwa mali ya kipekee ya Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) na watoa leseni wake. Service inalindwa na hakimiliki, alama za biashara, na sheria nyingine za nchi nyingine. Alama zetu za biashara haziwezi kutumiwa kuhusiana na bidhaa au huduma yoyote bila idhini ya maandishi ya awali kutoka Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ).

entries.source: Service is intended for access and use by individuals of any age, including minors i.e. under the age of 18 years.
entries.value: Service imekusudiwa kufikiwa na kutumiwa na watu wa umri wowote, wakiwemo watoto, yaani walio chini ya miaka 18.

entries.source: SERVICE means the https://web.archive.org/web/20221016155759/https://www.inspir.app website/inspir Mobile app operated by Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ). PERSONAL DATA means data about a living individual who can be identified from those data (or from those and other information either in our possession or likely to come into our possession). USAGE DATA is data collected automatically either generated by the use of the Service or from the Service infrastructure itself (for example, the duration of a page visit). COOKIES are small files stored on your device (computer or mobile device). DATA CONTROLLER means a natural or legal person who (either alone or jointly or in common with other persons) determines the purposes for which and the manner in which any personal data are, or are to be, processed. For the purpose of this Privacy Policy, we are a Data Controller of your data. DATA PROCESSORS (OR SERVICE PROVIDERS) means any natural or legal person who processes the data on behalf of the Data Controller. We may use the services of various Service Providers in order to process your data more effectively. DATA SUBJECT is any living individual who is the subject of Personal Data. THE USER is the individual using our Service. The User corresponds to the Data Subject, who is the subject of Personal Data.
entries.value: SERVICE inamaanisha tovuti ya https://web.archive.org/web/20221016155759/https://www.inspir.app/appu ya simu ya inspir inayoendeshwa na Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ). PERSONAL DATA inamaanisha data kuhusu mtu aliye hai ambaye anaweza kutambulika kutokana na data hiyo (au kutokana na data hiyo pamoja na taarifa nyingine tulizo nazo au ambazo huenda tukazipata). USAGE DATA ni data inayokusanywa kiotomatiki ama inayozalishwa na matumizi ya Service au kutoka kwenye miundombinu ya Service yenyewe (kwa mfano, muda wa kutembelea ukurasa). COOKIES ni faili ndogo zinazohifadhiwa kwenye kifaa chako (kompyuta au kifaa cha mkononi). DATA CONTROLLER inamaanisha mtu wa asili au wa kisheria ambaye (peke yake, kwa pamoja, au kwa ushirikiano na watu wengine) huamua madhumuni na namna ambayo data yoyote binafsi inachakatwa au itachakatwa. Kwa madhumuni ya Privacy Policy hii, sisi ni Data Controller wa data yako. DATA PROCESSORS (OR SERVICE PROVIDERS) inamaanisha mtu yeyote wa asili au wa kisheria anayechakata data kwa niaba ya Data Controller. Tunaweza kutumia huduma za Service Providers mbalimbali ili kuchakata data yako kwa ufanisi zaidi. DATA SUBJECT ni mtu yeyote aliye hai ambaye ndiye mhusika wa Personal Data. THE USER ni mtu anayetumia Service yetu. User analingana na Data Subject, ambaye ndiye mhusika wa Personal Data.

entries.source: Socratic AI Tutor For Deeper Understanding
entries.value: Mkufunzi wa AI wa Kisokrati kwa Uelewa wa Kina

entries.source: Socratic AI Tutor For Deeper Understanding is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Turn a concept, argument, problem, text, or decision into a focused chain of questions. Your buddy listens to each answer, maps assumptions and gaps, and pushes you toward your own final synthesis. Try: "Help me understand opportunity cost."
entries.value: Socratic AI Tutor For Deeper Understanding ni njia iliyolenga kutumia AI kwa kujifunza badala ya kukusanya majibu bila kushiriki. Hali hii imejengwa kuzunguka kazi maalum: geuza dhana, hoja, tatizo, maandishi, au uamuzi kuwa mlolongo wa maswali uliolenga. Rafiki yako husikiliza kila jibu, huchora dhana za msingi na mapengo, na hukusukuma kuelekea usanisi wako wa mwisho. Jaribu: "Help me understand opportunity cost."

entries.source: Socratic tutoring
entries.value: Ufundishaji wa Kisokratiki

entries.source: Socratic tutoring is not always the answer. If a learner has no background at all, a short explanation may be kinder than a question. If they are in crisis before a deadline, a planning mode like Exam Prep Planner or a hint mode like Homework Coach may be better. If the goal is remembering terms, Flashcard Builder is more direct.
entries.value: Ufundishaji wa Kisokrati si jibu kila wakati. Ikiwa mwanafunzi hana msingi wowote, maelezo mafupi yanaweza kuwa ya huruma zaidi kuliko swali. Ikiwa yuko kwenye shinikizo kabla ya muda wa mwisho, hali ya kupanga kama Exam Prep Planner au hali ya kidokezo kama Homework Coach inaweza kuwa bora. Ikiwa lengo ni kukumbuka istilahi, Flashcard Builder ni ya moja kwa moja zaidi.

entries.source: Socratic tutoring uses questions, hypotheses, hints, and reflection to build deeper understanding than passive answer reading.
entries.value: Ufundishaji wa Kisokrati hutumia maswali, dhana, vidokezo, na tafakari kujenga uelewa wa kina zaidi kuliko kusoma majibu bila kushiriki.

entries.value: Tatua hisabati hatua moja baada ya nyingine

entries.source: Some parts of Service are billed on a subscription basis ("Subscription(s)"). Each Competition hosted on our platform is an individual event and required to be paid for upon registration. You will be billed in advance on a recurring and periodic basis ("Billing Cycle"). Billing cycles will be set depending on the type of subscription plan you select when purchasing a Subscription. At the end of each Billing Cycle, your Subscription will automatically renew under the exact same conditions unless you cancel it or Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) cancels it. You may cancel your Subscription renewal either through your online account management page or by contacting support@inspir.app customer support team. A valid payment method is required to process the payment for your subscription. You shall provide Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) with accurate and complete billing information that may include but not limited to full name, address, state, postal or zip code, telephone number, and a valid payment method information. By submitting such payment information, you automatically authorize Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) to charge all Subscription fees incurred through your account to any such payment instruments. Should automatic billing fail to occur for any reason, Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) reserves the right to terminate your access to the Service with immediate effect. In case of any fraudulent activity, Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) can cancel subscription with immediate effect and the decision cannot be contested For paid Services, you must provide inspir with a valid payment source to pay for such Services. You acknowledge and agree that only an adult (18 years of age or older) can enter into any transaction or subscription with respect to such paid Services. Some Services may be available as a one-time purchase, and others can be purchased as a yearly subscription. Depending on where you transact with us and where your payment method was issued, your transaction with us may be subject to foreign exchange fees or differences in prices because of exchange rates.
entries.value: Baadhi ya sehemu za Service hutozwa kwa msingi wa usajili ("Subscription(s)"). Kila Competition linaloandaliwa kwenye jukwaa letu ni tukio binafsi na linahitaji kulipiwa wakati wa usajili. Utatozwa mapema kwa msingi unaojirudia na wa kipindi ("Billing Cycle"). Billing Cycle zitawekwa kulingana na aina ya mpango wa usajili unaochagua unaponunua Subscription. Mwishoni mwa kila Billing Cycle, Subscription yako itajisasisha kiotomatiki chini ya masharti yale yale isipokuwa uighairi au Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) iighairi. Unaweza kughairi usasishaji wa Subscription yako kupitia ukurasa wako wa usimamizi wa akaunti mtandaoni au kwa kuwasiliana na timu ya msaada kwa wateja ya support@inspir.app. Njia halali ya malipo inahitajika kuchakata malipo ya usajili wako. Unapaswa kuipa Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) taarifa sahihi na kamili za bili ambazo zinaweza kujumuisha, bila kikomo, jina kamili, anwani, jimbo, msimbo wa posta au zip, nambari ya simu, na taarifa ya njia halali ya malipo. Kwa kuwasilisha taarifa hizo za malipo, unaidhinisha kiotomatiki Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) kutoza ada zote za Subscription zinazotokana na akaunti yako kwenye zana zozote hizo za malipo. Endapo utozaji wa kiotomatiki utashindikana kwa sababu yoyote, Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) inahifadhi haki ya kusitisha ufikiaji wako wa Service mara moja. Ikiwa kuna shughuli yoyote ya udanganyifu, Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) inaweza kughairi usajili mara moja na uamuzi huo hauwezi kupingwa. Kwa Services za kulipia, lazima utoe kwa inspir chanzo halali cha malipo ili kulipia Services hizo. Unakubali na kuelewa kwamba ni mtu mzima tu (miaka 18 au zaidi) anaweza kuingia katika muamala au usajili wowote kuhusiana na Services hizo za kulipia. Baadhi ya Services zinaweza kupatikana kama ununuzi wa mara moja, na nyingine zinaweza kununuliwa kama usajili wa kila mwaka. Kulingana na mahali unapofanya muamala nasi na mahali njia yako ya malipo ilipotolewa, muamala wako nasi unaweza kutozwa ada za ubadilishaji fedha za kigeni au kuwa na tofauti za bei kutokana na viwango vya ubadilishaji.

entries.source: Some searches need a course library. Some need a live AI tutor, a hint, a Socratic question, a quiz, or a flashcard deck. These pages make that choice clearer.
entries.value: Baadhi ya utafutaji huhitaji maktaba ya kozi. Mengine huhitaji mkufunzi hai wa AI, kidokezo, swali la Kisokrati, jaribio, au seti ya flashcards. Kurasa hizi hufanya uchaguzi huo uwe wazi zaidi.

entries.source: Start this path
entries.value: Anza njia hii

entries.source: Start with "{value1}", then add what you already know and where you are stuck.
entries.value: Anza na "{value1}", kisha ongeza kile unachojua tayari na mahali ulipokwama.

entries.source: Start with a clear explanation
entries.value: Anza na maelezo yaliyo wazi

entries.source: Start with a draft or outline, ask for one priority, revise yourself, then use speaking or source critique to check whether the idea is clear and defensible.
entries.value: Anza na rasimu au muhtasari, omba kipaumbele kimoja, jirekebishe mwenyewe, kisha tumia mazoezi ya kuzungumza au uhakiki wa vyanzo kuangalia kama wazo liko wazi na linaweza kutetewa.

entries.source: Start with a pillar cluster that matches your learning job, read one guide, then open the linked public learning mode to turn the advice into practice.
entries.value: Anza na nguzo ya mada inayolingana na kazi yako ya kujifunza, soma mwongozo mmoja, kisha fungua hali ya umma ya kujifunza iliyounganishwa ili ushauri ugeuke kuwa mazoezi.

entries.source: Start with a short diagnostic quiz or topic confidence list, then build a plan around the areas that create the most uncertainty.
entries.value: Anza na jaribio fupi la uchunguzi au orodha ya kujiamini kwa mada, kisha jenga mpango kuzunguka maeneo yanayoleta mashaka zaidi.

entries.source: Start with a simple explanation, pressure-test the idea with questions, then turn the weak spots into active recall.
entries.value: Anza na maelezo rahisi, jaribu wazo kwa maswali, kisha geuza sehemu dhaifu kuwa kukumbuka kwa bidii.

entries.source: Start with a simple explanation, then ask Socratic questions until you can explain it back.
entries.value: Anza na maelezo rahisi, kisha uliza maswali ya Kisokrati hadi uweze kulieleza tena.

entries.source: Start with a specific goal such as "{value1}". The mode works best when you include what you already know, where you are stuck, and what kind of help you want.
entries.value: Anza na lengo mahususi kama "{value1}". Hali hii hufanya kazi vizuri zaidi unapojumuisha kile unachojua tayari, mahali ulipokwama, na aina ya msaada unaotaka.

entries.source: Start with a topic, assignment, draft, exam, or idea in the mode that fits the job.
entries.value: Anza na mada, kazi, rasimu, mtihani, au wazo katika hali inayofaa kazi hiyo.

entries.source: Start with example prompts
entries.value: Anza na mifano ya vidokezo

entries.source: Start with example prompts.
entries.value: Anza na mifano ya vidokezo.

entries.source: Start with Learn Anything
entries.value: Anza na Jifunze Chochote

entries.source: Start with Learn Anything for a simple explanation, Homework Coach for a stuck assignment, or Flashcard Builder when the goal is review.
entries.value: Anza na Learn Anything kwa maelezo rahisi, Homework Coach kwa kazi iliyokwama, au Flashcard Builder wakati lengo ni marudio.

entries.source: Start with Learn Anything if you have a topic in mind. Try Socratic Instruction if you want questions instead of an explanation. Use Flashcard Builder when you need to remember, or Exam Prep Planner when the problem is organizing your study time.
entries.value: Anza na Learn Anything ikiwa una mada akilini. Jaribu Socratic Instruction ikiwa unataka maswali badala ya maelezo. Tumia Flashcard Builder unapohitaji kukumbuka, au Exam Prep Planner wakati tatizo ni kupanga muda wako wa kusoma.

entries.source: Start with Learn Anything when you need orientation and a plain explanation.
entries.value: Anza na Learn Anything unapohitaji kujielekeza na kupata maelezo ya kawaida.

entries.source: Start with Math Step Coach for equations or worked solutions, Homework Coach for assignments, and Flashcard Builder when you need to remember formulas or mistake patterns.
entries.value: Anza na Math Step Coach kwa milinganyo au suluhisho zilizoelezwa, Homework Coach kwa kazi za nyumbani, na Flashcard Builder unapohitaji kukumbuka fomula au mifumo ya makosa.

entries.source: Start with one clear request
entries.value: Anza na ombi moja lililo wazi

entries.source: Start with one practical guide, then open a related public learning mode so the advice becomes practice. This category is designed for {value1}
entries.value: Anza na mwongozo mmoja wa vitendo, kisha fungua hali ya umma ya kujifunza inayohusiana ili ushauri uwe mazoezi. Kategoria hii imeundwa kwa {value1}

entries.source: Start with place, time, identity, constraints, and evidence labels so the scene does not become generic roleplay.
entries.value: Anza na mahali, wakati, utambulisho, vikwazo, na lebo za ushahidi ili tukio lisiwe uigizaji wa jumla.

entries.source: Start with prompts that keep the learning active.
entries.value: Anza na vidokezo vinavyofanya kujifunza kubaki hai.

entries.source: Start with public guest mode, then shape the school version around real needs.
entries.value: Anza na hali ya umma ya mgeni, kisha tengeneza toleo la shule kuzunguka mahitaji halisi.

entries.source: Start with public guidance, then open the right mode.
entries.value: Anza na mwongozo wa umma, kisha fungua hali sahihi.

entries.source: Start with Talk to a Historical Person for a figure-led conversation. Use Time Travel for a place-and-period expedition. Read the Talk to a Historical Person guide or the Time Travel prompts and study loop if you want a more structured workflow.
entries.value: Anza na Talk to a Historical Person kwa mazungumzo yanayoongozwa na mhusika. Tumia Time Travel kwa safari ya mahali na kipindi. Soma mwongozo wa Talk to a Historical Person au vidokezo na mzunguko wa masomo wa Time Travel ikiwa unataka mtiririko uliopangwa zaidi.

entries.source: Start with the broadest learning mode.
entries.value: Anza na hali pana zaidi ya kujifunza.

entries.source: Start with the guide that best matches the learning job in front of you.
entries.value: Anza na mwongozo unaolingana zaidi na kazi ya kujifunza iliyo mbele yako.

entries.source: Start with the job you need done.
entries.value: Anza na kazi unayohitaji kufanywa.

entries.source: Start with the live mode if you need help now, use a prompt if you know the exact move you want, and read the guide when you want the full study loop and mistakes to avoid.
entries.value: Anza na hali ya moja kwa moja ikiwa unahitaji msaada sasa, tumia kidokezo ikiwa unajua hatua halisi unayotaka, na soma mwongozo unapotaka mzunguko kamili wa masomo na makosa ya kuepuka.

entries.source: Start with the mode that matches the learning problem.
entries.value: Anza na hali inayolingana na tatizo la kujifunza.

entries.source: Start with the mode that matches the moment.
entries.value: Anza na hali inayolingana na wakati huo.

entries.source: Start with the public learning companion.
entries.value: Anza na mwenzi wa umma wa kujifunza.

entries.source: Start with the public modes, then use the schools page to review deployment steps, use cases, and trust boundaries.
entries.value: Anza na hali za umma, kisha tumia ukurasa wa shule kupitia hatua za usambazaji, matumizi, na mipaka ya uaminifu.

entries.source: Started as public quizzes and student communities in 2013.
entries.value: Ilianza kama maswali ya umma na jumuiya za wanafunzi mwaka 2013.

entries.source: Story Tutor AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Turn concepts into stories, characters, conflicts, and memorable scenes.
entries.value: Hali ya Kujifunza kwa AI ya Story Tutor ni njia iliyolenga kutumia AI kwa kujifunza badala ya kukusanya majibu bila kushiriki. Hali hii imejengwa kuzunguka kazi maalum: geuza dhana kuwa hadithi, wahusika, migogoro, na matukio yanayokumbukika.

entries.value: Hali ya Kujifunza kwa AI ya Story Tutor: mwongozo wa vitendo

entries.value: Hali za hadithi, sanaa, muziki, na kuchangamsha mawazo zinazogeuza kazi ya ubunifu kuwa mchakato wa kujifunza ulioongozwa.

entries.value: Gumzo la AI kwa wanafunzi

entries.source: Student Forum
entries.value: Jukwaa la Wanafunzi

entries.source: Student homework, parent support, teacher evaluation, and self-study all need different framing.
entries.value: Kazi za nyumbani za wanafunzi, msaada wa wazazi, tathmini ya walimu, na kujisomea vyote vinahitaji mpangilio tofauti.

entries.source: Students
entries.value: Wanafunzi

entries.source: Students and self-taught learners who need structure without turning the plan into an impossible checklist.
entries.value: Wanafunzi na wanaojifunza wenyewe wanaohitaji muundo bila kuufanya mpango huo kuwa orodha isiyowezekana ya kutekelezeka.

entries.source: Students need direct support, teachers need focused learning behavior, leaders need responsible deployment paths, and partners need clear ways to fund access.
entries.value: Wanafunzi wanahitaji msaada wa moja kwa moja, walimu wanahitaji tabia za kujifunza zilizoelekezwa, viongozi wanahitaji njia za uwajibikaji za usambazaji, na washirika wanahitaji njia wazi za kufadhili ufikiaji.

entries.source: Students need fast help, but the help still has to leave the thinking in their hands. inspir routes common study moments into focused public modes instead of one generic answer box.
entries.value: Wanafunzi wanahitaji msaada wa haraka, lakini msaada huo bado unapaswa kuacha kufikiri mikononi mwao. inspir huelekeza nyakati za kawaida za kusoma kwenye hali za umma zilizoelekezwa badala ya kisanduku kimoja cha majibu ya jumla.

entries.source: Students preparing essays, explanations, presentations, interviews, or oral exams.
entries.value: Wanafunzi wanaojiandaa kwa insha, maelezo, mawasilisho, mahojiano, au mitihani ya mdomo.
